4 5 > Kcode lets you run long, tool heavy coding sessions without blowing up token costs by compressing old context into references and only restoring exact data when needed, reducing hallucinations by grounding the model in real, retrievable source data instead of guesswork. 6 7 --- 8 9 Kcode is a local first coding agent harness with a terminal UI, tool orchestration, memory/context management, and an optional local GGUF sidecar model. 10 11 [![Hugging Face](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hugging%20Face-icedmoca%2Fkcode--oss--20b--mxfp4-yellow?logo=huggingface)](https://huggingface.co/icedmoca/kcode-oss-20b-mxfp4) 12 13 For a detailed architecture explanation, see [ABOUT.md](ABOUT.md). 14 15 For details on hallucination mitigation, exact context rehydration, and real token-saving data, see [HALLUCINATION_MITIGATION.md](HALLUCINATION_MITIGATION.md) and [STATISTICS.md](STATISTICS.md). 16 17 ## Documentation 18 19 - [Benchmarks](BENCHMARKS.md) - measured token reduction, tool-schema pruning, and benchmark methodology. 20 ... 211 more lines (use start_line=21 to continue) [trace] status_detail=opening websocket [trace] connection_phase=connecting [trace] connection_type=websocket/persistent-fresh [trace] connection_phase=waiting for response [trace] connection_phase=streaming [trace] token_usage input=4712 output=16 cache_read=0 cache_write=0
